---
title: "Mapa Interactivo"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
source("scripts/cargar_datos.R")

library(leaflet)
library(htmltools)


icono_arbol <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = "tree",
  library = "fa",
  markerColor = "green",
  iconColor = "white"
)

icono_ave <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = "dove",
  library = "fa",
  markerColor = "blue",
  iconColor = "white"
)

icono_poi <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = "star",
  library = "fa",
  markerColor = "red",
  iconColor = "white"
)

```

```{r}

# leaflet() %>%
# 
# addProviderTiles(
#   providers$Esri.WorldImagery,
#   group = "Satélite"
# ) %>%
# 
# addCircleMarkers(
# 
#   data = arboles,
# 
#   lng = ~longitud,
#   lat = ~latitud,
# 
#   radius = 6,
# 
#   color = "darkgreen",
# 
#   fillOpacity = 0.9,
# 
#   group = "Árboles",
# 
#   popup = ~paste0(
#   "<h3>", nombre_comun, "</h3>",
#   "<i>", nombre_cientifico, "</i><br><br>",
#   "<b>Continente:</b> ", continente, "<br>",
#   "<b>Plantado:</b> ", año_plantacion
# )
# 
# ) %>%
# 
# addCircleMarkers(
# 
#   data = aves,
# 
#   lng = ~longitud,
#   lat = ~latitud,
# 
#   radius = 5,
# 
#   color = "blue",
# 
#   fillOpacity = 0.9,
# 
#   group = "Aves",
# 
#   popup = ~paste0(
#   "<h3>", especie, "</h3>",
#   "<i>", nombre_cientifico, "</i><br><br>",
# 
# )
# 
# ) %>%
# 
#   
 


leaflet() %>%

addProviderTiles(
  providers$Esri.WorldImagery,
  group = "Satélite"
) %>%

 addAwesomeMarkers(

   data = dplyr::filter(
     arboles,
     !is.na(latitud),
     !is.na(longitud)
   ),

   lng = ~longitud,
   lat = ~latitud,

   icon = icono_arbol,

   group = "Árboles",

   # popup = ~paste0(
   #   "<h3>", nombre_comun, "</h3>",
   #   "<i>", nombre_cientifico, "</i><br><br>",
   #   "<b>Continente:</b> ", continente, "<br>",
   #   "<b>Plantado:</b> ", año_plantacion
   # )
   popup = ~paste0(

"<h3>", nombre_comun, "</h3>",

"<i>", nombre_cientifico, "</i><br><br>",

  ifelse(
    is.na(foto),
    "",
    paste0(
      "<img src='fotos/",
      foto,
      "' style='max-width:100px; height:auto; border-radius:8px;'><br><br>"
      
    )
  ),

"<b>Continente:</b> ",
continente,
"<br>",

"<b>Plantado:</b> ",
año_plantacion

)

 )%>%

# addAwesomeMarkers(
#   data = aves,
#   lng = ~longitud,
#   lat = ~latitud,
#   icon = icono_ave,
#   group = "Aves",
#   # popup = ~paste0(
#   #   "<h3>", especie, "</h3>",
#   #   "<i>", nombre_cientifico, "</i><br><br>"
#   # )
#     popup = ~paste0(
# 
#     "<h3>", especie, "</h3>",
# 
#     "<i>", nombre_cientifico, "</i><br><br>",
# 
#     ifelse(
#       is.na(foto),
#       "",
#       paste0(
#         "<img src='fotos/",
#         foto,
#         "' style='max-width:100px; height:auto; border-radius:8px;'><br><br>"
#       )
#     ),
# ) %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(
  # data = aves,
  data = dplyr::filter(
     aves,
     !is.na(latitud),
     !is.na(longitud)
   ),
  lng = ~longitud,
  lat = ~latitud,
  icon = icono_ave,
  group = "Aves",
  popup = ~paste0(

    "<h3>", especie, "</h3>",

    "<i>", nombre_cientifico, "</i><br><br>",

    ifelse(
      is.na(foto),
      "",
      paste0(
        "<img src='fotos/",
        foto,
        "' style='max-width:100px; height:auto; border-radius:8px;'><br><br>"
      )
    )

  )

) %>%

  addAwesomeMarkers(
  # data = puntos,
    data = dplyr::filter(
     puntos,
     !is.na(latitud),
     !is.na(longitud)
   ),
  lng = ~longitud,
  lat = ~latitud,
  icon = icono_poi,
  group = "Puntos de interés",
  # popup = ~paste0(
  #   "<h3>", nombre, "</h3>",
  #   "<b>Tipo:</b> ", tipo, "<br><br>",
  #   descripcion
  # )
    popup = ~paste0(

    "<h3>", nombre, "</h3>",

    "<i>", descripcion, "</i><br><br>",

    ifelse(
      is.na(foto),
      "",
      paste0(
        "<img src='fotos/",
        foto,
        "' style='max-width:100px; height:auto; border-radius:8px;'><br><br>"
      )
    )

  )
)%>%

addLayersControl(
  overlayGroups = c("Árboles", "Aves", "Puntos de interés"),
  options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
)
```
